YouTube

Frank Coxx · Notary Public

The Notary's Toolkit

Everything You Need to Run a Professional Notary Business

FC

Hey! I'm Frank — a working notary who has tested and used everything on this page. These are my personal recommendations to help you run a smooth, professional notary business. I only recommend products I actually use or genuinely believe in.

ℹ️ Some links are affiliate links. I may earn a small commission at no extra cost to you.

Section 01

Printers & Scanners

Best printers and scanners for home office notaries — tested gear that handles high-volume signing packages without missing a beat.

Frank's Pick
(4.5 / 5)

Brother HL-L5210DWT Business Monochrome Laser Printer

Dual paper trays, wireless & Gigabit Ethernet networking, built-in duplex printing, and large paper capacity — built for high-volume notary signings at home or the office.

Check Price on Amazon
(4.0 / 5)

HP LaserJet M602X CE993A Laser Printer (Renewed) — Budget Friendly

A certified renewed workhorse that delivers professional laser-quality prints at a fraction of the cost. Perfect for notaries who need reliable output without breaking the bank.

Check Price on Amazon
(4.5 / 5)

Plustek PS186 Desktop Document Scanner

50-page Auto Document Feeder scans entire signing packages in minutes. Compatible with Windows 7/8/10/11 — a must-have for digitizing and archiving your notary documents fast.

Check Price on Amazon

Section 02

Computers & Tablets

Best laptops and iPads for notaries — fast, reliable, and built for the road.

Frank's Pick
(4.5 / 5)

Microsoft Surface Pro 7+ 2-in-1 Tablet — Intel Core i7, 16GB RAM, 512GB SSD (Renewed)

A powerhouse 2-in-1 tablet for notaries who need desktop performance on the road. 12.3" touchscreen, Windows 11 Pro, and all-day battery — perfect for RON sessions and document management.

Check Price on Amazon
(5.0 / 5)

Apple iPad 11-inch (A16) — 128GB, Wi-Fi 6, Liquid Retina Display, Silver

The latest iPad with A16 chip, 12MP front and back cameras, Touch ID, and all-day battery life. Lightweight and powerful — ideal for mobile notaries handling digital documents and RON sessions.

Check Price on Amazon
(4.5 / 5)

Dell 24 All-in-One Desktop — Intel Core 3, 8GB DDR5, 512GB SSD, Windows 11 Home

23.8-inch FHD display, Intel Core 3 processor, and a clean all-in-one design — perfect for a home office notary who wants a powerful workstation without the clutter of a tower.

Check Price on Amazon

Section 03

Notary Supplies

Stamps, journals, pens, embossers, and folders — the essentials every notary needs in their bag.

Frank's Pick
(5.0 / 5)

ExcelMark Notary Stamp — Official State Seal, All 50 States

Clean, professional impressions every time. Available for all 50 states with the official state seal — a must-have for every notary who wants to look sharp and stay compliant.

Check Price on Amazon
(4.5 / 5)

Clever Fox Notary Journal Log Book — 612 Entries, Numbered Pages, Hardcover 8.5x11"

612 record entries with numbered pages and a durable hardcover — keeps you legally protected and perfectly organized for every signing. One of the best notary journals on the market.

Check Price on Amazon
(4.5 / 5)

Linbsunne Gel Pens Black Ink 0.5mm Fine Point — Smooth Writing Retractable (12-Count)

Ultra-fine 0.5mm tip delivers clean, precise signatures every time. Smooth retractable design, great grip, and clients love how they write — a notary bag essential.

Check Price on Amazon
(5.0 / 5)

Start Your Notary Public & Loan Signing Agent Business — The Insider's Guide to a Six-Figure Notary Side Hustle

Everything you need to launch and grow a profitable notary business — all state requirements included. The go-to guide for notaries serious about building real income.

Check Price on Amazon
(4.5 / 5)

Amazon Basics Multipurpose Printer Paper — 8.5x11", 20lb, 92 Bright, 8 Reams (4,000 Sheets)

Never run out mid-signing. 4,000 sheets of bright white 92-brightness paper delivers crisp, professional prints every time — stocked in bulk so you're always ready for high-volume signing packages.

Check Price on Amazon
(4.5 / 5)

Staples Recycled Legal Size File Folders — 1/3-Cut Tabs, Manila, 100/Box

Legal-size manila folders perfect for organizing signing packages. 30% recycled paper stock, 1/3-cut tabs for easy labeling — stock up and never run out on a busy signing day.

Check Price on Amazon

Section 04

Software & Apps

Signing software, scheduling tools, and e-notary platforms that keep your business running smoothly.

Frank's Pick
(5.0 / 5)

Certified Trust Delivery Agent

Get certified and stand out from the competition. This training program walks you through everything you need to become a trusted, professional trust delivery agent and grow your notary income.

Enroll Now
(5.0 / 5)

High Performance Notary

Take your notary business to the next level. High Performance Notary gives you the systems, strategies, and community to build a thriving, six-figure notary business.

Enroll Now
(5.0 / 5)

AI Content Creators

Learn how to use AI to create content, grow your notary brand online, and attract more clients. Perfect for notaries who want to build a presence on social media and YouTube.

Join Now

Section 05

Bags & Organization

Notary bags, document organizers, and car accessories — stay mobile and look professional on every job.

Frank's Pick
(5.0 / 5)

VANKEAN Premium Laptop Briefcase — Fits Up to 17.3", Expandable, Water-Repellent

This is what I carry to every signing. Premium business shoulder bag with expandable storage, water-repellent exterior, and enough room for your laptop, journal, stamps, and full signing kit.

Check Price on Amazon
(4.5 / 5)

ENGPOW Fireproof File Organizer Bag — 13-Pocket Accordion, Lock & Labels, Portable

Fireproof, lockable, and portable with 13 accordion pockets and labels. Keeps your important notary documents, contracts, and records safe whether you're at home or on the road.

Check Price on Amazon
(4.5 / 5)

TRUNKCRATEPRO XL Heavy-Duty Trunk Organizer — 6 Adjustable Compartments, Non-Slip Base, Foldable

Built for SUVs and trucks — 6 adjustable compartments with securing straps keep your notary supplies, printer, and signing packages from shifting on the way to every appointment.

Check Price on Amazon
